title: VETERANS SERVICES - 211info
text: COOS COUNTY VETERANS SERVICE OFFICE VETERANS SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF County Veterans Service Offices (CVSOs) serve as the entry points to understanding the benefits, resources, and entitlements available to veterans, their dependents, and survivors. CVSOs can provide the following: -Veterans' benefits counseling and claims preparation assistance, as well as advocacy throughout the claims process -Counseling on federal VA benefits and other state and federal ancillary benefits -Educational benefit claims assistance -Assistance for veterans who wish to enroll in health care -Assistance for requesting military service documents -Service-connected and non-service-related disability and survivor benefits -Burial benefits -Information about veteran home loans -Oregon Veterans' Home Conservatorship services, including total estate management for eligible individuals who are legally determined to be "protected persons" under Oregon law 1611 Virginia Avenue North Bend, OR 97459 Eligibility: Veterans with any discharge status other than dishonorable and their immediate family members (spouses, surviving spouses who have not remarried, children, or stepchildren) Hours: -North Bend: Monday-Wednesday 9am-5pm by appointment only, Thursday 9am-5pm walk in -Lakeside (Senior Center): 1st Wednesday of the month by appointment only -Bandon (VFW Hall): 1st Thursday of the month by appointment only -Myrtle Point (VFW Hall): 1st Tuesday of the month by appointment only Email (541) 551-0222 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 551-0222 Alternate (541) 294-0166 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for an appointment. Leave a message about which location you would like to visit. Please do not leave duplicate messages. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: DD214, discharge papers, non-VA medical records, and direct deposit information. If other records are needed, the VSO will let the client know. AREA SERVED: Coos County Services: Benefits and Services Assistance * Veteran/Military Personnel Issues Burial Benefits * Veteran/Military Personnel Issues General Health Insurance Information/Counseling * Veteran/Military Personnel Issues Military Records Other Services Offered At This Location: TEMPORARY FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE - OREGON VETERANS EMERGENCY FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. COOS COUNTY VETERANS SERVICE OFFICE
